food_pairing.name: Priorat Garnacha with calçots and romesco
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat Garnacha red with calçots amb romesco
food_pairing.description: Charred spring onions with roasted nut-and-pepper romesco sauce meet Garnacha dark fruit and garrigue character. A Priorat village-level or estate red at full temperature amplifies the smokiness of the grill.

food_pairing.name: Priorat red blend with botifarra and white beans
food_pairing.pairing: DOQ Priorat red blend with botifarra amb mongetes
food_pairing.description: Catalan pork sausage with white beans pairs with a Garnacha-Cariñena blend. The savoury fat and herbed pork of the dish find balance in the wine's mineral lift and medium tannin. Classic at the counter at Cal Pep in Barcelona.

food_pairing.name: Priorat Garnacha blend with escudella i carn d'olla
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat Garnacha blend with escudella i carn d'olla
food_pairing.description: Catalonia's slow-cooked winter stew of pork, chicken, veal, and root vegetables demands a full Priorat red. Its richness and herbal depth match the garrigue and iron mineral core of a concentrated estate wine with the structure to stand up without dominating the broth.

food_pairing.name: Priorat mid-weight red with fideuà de marisc
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat mid-weight red with fideuà de marisc
food_pairing.description: Short noodles cooked in sofrito-based seafood broth with a toasted crust similar to socarrat. A Garnacha-forward Priorat with medium body and high acidity cuts the richness without masking the sea-sweet noodle crust. Barcelona institution 7 Portes serves a rotating seafood version.

food_pairing.name: Priorat white with anxoves de l'Escala and pa amb tomaquet
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat white with anxoves de l'Escala and pa amb tomaquet
food_pairing.description: Salt-cured anchovies from l'Escala on tomato-rubbed bread create a saline, umami-rich bite that resonates with the gypsum-mineral character of a Priorat white. The wine's texture and racy acidity lift rather than clash with the fish's intensity. El Xampanyet in Born serves anchovies as the house centrepiece.

food_pairing.name: Priorat Vi Ranci with crema catalana
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat Vi Ranci with crema catalana
food_pairing.description: The oxidative aged Garnacha tradition of Priorat produces a Vi Ranci with walnut, dried apricot, toffee, and rancio complexity that mirrors the caramelised custard and orange-peel notes of crema catalana. A small glass served alongside the dessert bridges the region's monastic winemaking past with its culinary present.

food_pairing.name: Old-vine Priorat Cariñena with conserves and montaditos
food_pairing.pairing: Old-vine Priorat Cariñena with conserves and montaditos
food_pairing.description: Standing bars of Barcelona's Poble-sec and Born neighbourhoods specialise in high-quality tinned mussels, clams, and cockles. The iron-mineral and high-acid structure of old-vine Cariñena from Priorat cuts through the brine and amplifies the sea-mineral notes. Quimet i Quimet is the Barcelona reference for this combination.

food_pairing.name: Priorat natural and low-intervention wines at Bar Brutal
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat natural and low-intervention wines at Barcelona natural wine bars
food_pairing.description: The natural-wine movement in Priorat, led by producers using amphora ageing, whole-cluster fermentation, and minimal intervention, aligns with Barcelona's natural-wine bar culture. Bar Brutal in Born is a Barcelona anchor for Catalan natural wines alongside Italian-Catalan small plates.

food_pairing.name: Priorat prestige reds by the glass at Monvinic
food_pairing.pairing: Priorat prestige reds by the glass at Monvinic
food_pairing.description: Monvinic in Eixample stocks 3,500 bottles and pours a rotating selection of Catalan and Spanish prestige wines by the glass. Estate wines from Priorat appear on serious by-the-glass programmes here, paired with Catalan tapas and charcuterie. The in-house sommelier school means staff who understand llicorella terroir.
